subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! The bounties of His verses are manifest, the heavenly feast of clear proofs hath descended, and pure hearts and souls are adorned with the ornament of fellowship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله نعمت آیات ظاهر و مائده بینات نازل و افئده و قلوب صافیه بطراز الفت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @predictions and prophecies, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
